caption: A group of men, wearing matching white polo shirts, dark pants, and black face masks, walk through a modern airport terminal with glass walls and ceilings. Many of the men carry black backpacks. The Real Madrid club crest is visible in the top corners of several scenes. On-screen text in the top frames reads "BARAJAS AIRPORT 11:15". As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts, showing the men walking forward in a line. In some shots, the camera is close to the individuals, while others provide a wider view of the group moving through the corridor. The lighting is bright and natural, filtering through the glass structures. The men maintain a steady pace, continuing their walk through the terminal without interacting with each other in a visible manner.
